subject: Q2 estimated taxes — due June 16
snippet: Merrill, attaching the Q2 estimate for Bellwood Holdings LLC. The voucher and the payment link are inside. Let me know if the rental income figure looks right.
body:
Merrill,

Attaching the Q2 estimated tax voucher for Bellwood Holdings LLC. Based on the year-to-date rental income and the consulting receipts you sent over, the estimate is $4,180. I included the EFTPS payment link.

Please confirm the rental income figure on line 3 matches your records before you submit.

Best,
Dana Whitfield, CPA

subject: Tenant renewal — 1420 Linden Unit 2
snippet: The tenant in Unit 2 wants to renew for 12 months. Proposed rent is $1,475/mo. Do you approve, or would you like to adjust before we send the lease?
body:
Hi Merrill,

The tenant in Unit 2 at 1420 Linden has asked to renew for another 12 months. We're recommending $1,475/mo (a 3% increase). They've paid on time all year.

Reply 'approve' and we'll send the renewal lease for e-signature.

Thanks,
Riverside Property Management

subject: Proposal draft for the Oakbrook engagement
snippet: Attached is the v2 proposal for the Oakbrook strategy engagement. I moved the kickoff to mid-July and adjusted the fee to the scope we discussed. Want to review before I send it Friday?
body:
Merrill,

v2 of the Oakbrook proposal is attached. Changes from v1:
- Kickoff pushed to the week of July 13
- Fee adjusted to $18,000 fixed for the 6-week scope
- Added the data-room access clause you flagged

If it looks good I'll send to the client Friday morning.

Hector

subject: Your June statement is ready
snippet: The June statement for your Bellwood Holdings LLC business checking (…4471) is now available. Ending balance and recent transactions are in your account.
body:
Your monthly statement is ready.

Account: Bellwood Holdings LLC Business Complete Checking (…4471)
Statement period: May 26 – June 25, 2026

Sign in to view your ending balance and transactions. This is an automated message; please do not reply.

subject: Invoice #2041 was paid
snippet: Good news — invoice #2041 to Oakbrook Partners for $6,000 was paid in full. Funds will deposit in 1–2 business days.
body:
Invoice #2041 has been paid.

Customer: Oakbrook Partners
Amount: $6,000.00
Status: Paid in full

Deposits typically arrive within 1–2 business days.

subject: Landlord policy renewal — 1420 Linden
snippet: Your landlord policy on the Linden duplex renews July 1. Premium is steady at $1,840/yr. I can bind it today — just reply to confirm the coverage limits are unchanged.
body:
Hi Merrill,

Your landlord/dwelling policy on 1420 Linden renews July 1. The premium holds at $1,840/year with the same $500K liability limit.

Reply to confirm and I'll bind it. If you've made any improvements to the property, let me know so we can update the replacement cost.

Laura Beck, State Farm

subject: Re: kickoff logistics
snippet: Thanks Merrill. The week of July 13 works on our end. Can you send the engagement letter and the W-9 so procurement can set you up as a vendor?
body:
Merrill,

The week of July 13 works for us. To get you into our system, our procurement team needs:
- The signed engagement letter
- A W-9 for Bellwood Holdings LLC

Once those are in we'll issue the PO. Looking forward to it.

J. Mueller
Oakbrook Partners

subject: Estimate: gutter + soffit repair, Linden duplex
snippet: Estimate attached for the gutter and soffit work at 1420 Linden — $2,650, about two days of work. We can start the week of July 6 if you approve.
body:
Mr. Bellwood,

Thanks for having us out. The estimate for the gutter replacement and soffit repair at 1420 Linden is $2,650, roughly two days of work. That includes hauling the old material.

We have an opening the week of July 6. Reply to approve and we'll get you on the schedule.

Sal's Roofing & Exteriors

subject: Annual report reminder — Bellwood Holdings LLC
snippet: Illinois requires your LLC annual report by the end of the registration anniversary month. We can file it for you for $99 plus the state fee. No action needed if you've already filed.
body:
Reminder: Illinois LLC Annual Report

Bellwood Holdings LLC's annual report is due by the end of your anniversary month to keep the LLC in good standing. We can prepare and file it for $99 plus the $75 state fee.

If you've already filed directly with the Secretary of State, disregard this notice.

subject: Hector shared 'Oakbrook — data room' with you
snippet: Hector Ramos shared a folder. It contains the engagement letter, the W-9, and the v2 proposal. Click to open in Dropbox.
body:
Hector Ramos (hector@ramos-consulting.com) shared the folder 'Oakbrook — data room' with you.

Contents: engagement-letter.pdf, W9-BellwoodHoldings.pdf, proposal-v2.pdf

Open in Dropbox to view. You can comment directly on the files.

subject: Kitchen faucet is leaking
snippet: Hi Merrill — the kitchen faucet started dripping pretty badly this week and the cabinet underneath is getting wet. Could you send someone to look at it? Happy to be home this weekend.
body:
Hi Merrill,

The kitchen faucet has started dripping badly over the last few days and the cabinet base underneath is getting wet. I put a towel down for now.

Could you send a plumber? I can be home Saturday or Sunday any time.

Thanks,
Priya (Unit 2)

subject: Your subscription renews in 5 days
snippet: Your Email Marketing plan ($45/mo) renews on July 1. No action needed to continue. Update your card or cancel anytime from billing settings.
body:
Your Constant Contact subscription renews soon.

Plan: Email Marketing — Standard ($45/month)
Renews: July 1, 2026

No action is needed to keep your account active. You can update payment or cancel from your billing settings.

subject: Off-market duplex on 22nd — worth a look?
snippet: Merrill, a 2-flat on 22nd is coming off-market before it lists. Numbers pencil out around a 7.5% cap. I can get you in this week if you're interested in adding to the portfolio.
body:
Merrill,

A well-kept 2-flat on 22nd is about to come available off-market. Asking is $289K; at market rents it pencils to roughly a 7.5% cap. Tenants in place, both current.

Want me to set up a private showing this week before it hits the MLS?

Marcus Webb, Webb Realty

subject: Keep business + village email separate
snippet: Quick note: please keep the LLC and rental correspondence on this personal address, not your village account. It keeps the books clean and avoids tangling private business with public records.
body:
Merrill,

Friendly reminder from your accountant: route anything about Bellwood Holdings, the rentals, or the consulting through this personal email — not the village address.

It keeps the business books clean at tax time and, just as important, keeps your private business out of anything that could become a public record. Happy to explain more if useful.

Dana

subject: Dispensary license renewal due — Harbor Wellness (Cary)
snippet: Your Adult Use/Medical Dispensing Organization license for Harbor Wellness Dispensary (Cary, IL) is up for annual renewal by July 31. Renewal fee and compliance attestation required.
body:
Notice of License Renewal

Licensee: Harbor Wellness Dispensary LLC
Location: 412 Northwest Hwy, Cary, IL
License: Dispensing Organization (Adult Use + Medical)

Your annual license renewal is due by July 31, 2026. To renew, submit the renewal fee, the updated surety bond, and the compliance attestation (security plan, METRC reconciliation, and employee agent cards). Failure to renew by the deadline may result in suspension.

This is an automated message from the Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation.

subject: Monthly inventory reconciliation — action needed
snippet: Harbor Wellness has 3 packages flagged for variance in this month's seed-to-sale reconciliation. Please review and adjust in METRC before the state report locks on the 30th.
body:
Hello,

Your monthly seed-to-sale reconciliation for Harbor Wellness Dispensary shows 3 packages with quantity variances. State rules require these be resolved before the monthly report locks on June 30.

Flagged tags:
- 1A4FF0100000022000001181 (flower, -2.1g)
- 1A4FF0100000022000001204 (vape, -1 unit)
- 1A4FF0100000022000001233 (edible, +1 unit)

Review the discrepancies and submit adjustments in METRC. Reply if you need a walkthrough.

subject: Armored pickup schedule change — Cary location
snippet: Your Tuesday cash pickup for Harbor Wellness is moving to 10:30 AM starting next week. Please confirm a staff member with the safe combination will be on site.
body:
Mr. Bellwood,

Due to route changes, your armored cash pickup at the Cary dispensary is moving from 2:00 PM to 10:30 AM, effective next Tuesday. Given the cash-intensive nature of the business, please ensure a manager with safe access is on site during the window.

Confirm the new time works and we'll update the standing schedule.

Brink's Cash Logistics

subject: Staffing + Saturday demand at the dispensary
snippet: Merrill — we're slammed on Saturdays and short two budtenders. I'd like to hire one full-time and one part-time. Also need your sign-off on the updated security guard schedule. Can we do our P&L review Monday?
body:
Hi Merrill,

A few things from the floor:
1. Saturdays are consistently our busiest day and we're running short — I'd like to hire one full-time budtender and one part-time. Both would need agent cards.
2. The security guard contract needs your sign-off for the updated weekend hours.
3. June numbers are strong; can we do the quarterly P&L review Monday at 9?

Let me know and I'll set it up.

Maya

subject: Your wholesale order #88231 has shipped
snippet: Harbor Wellness order #88231 (assorted flower, vapes, and edibles) shipped via licensed transporter and is scheduled for delivery Friday. Manifest attached for METRC intake.
body:
Order Confirmation — #88231

Customer: Harbor Wellness Dispensary (Cary)
Items: 14 SKUs — flower (3.5g & 7g), 510 vape carts, gummies
Subtotal: $11,420
Transport: licensed distributor, ETA Friday AM

The state manifest is attached; have a receiving agent ready to verify tags and accept the transfer in METRC at delivery.

subject: You're invited — Annual Scholarship Gala, July 12
snippet: Please join us for the Cary Education Foundation Scholarship Gala on Saturday, July 12 at the Chevy Chase Country Club. Cocktails 6 PM, dinner 7 PM. We'd be honored to have you as a table sponsor.
body:
Dear Merrill,

You're warmly invited to the Cary Education Foundation's Annual Scholarship Gala:

Saturday, July 12, 2026
Chevy Chase Country Club, Wheeling
Cocktails 6:00 PM · Dinner & program 7:00 PM
Black tie optional

Proceeds fund scholarships for District 26 graduates. We'd be honored to have you as a $2,500 table sponsor — your generosity last year made a real difference. RSVP by July 5.

With gratitude,
Cary Education Foundation

subject: Rotary Charity Golf Outing — July 19 (foursome?)
snippet: Our annual charity golf outing benefiting the food pantry is July 19 at Foxford Hills. Shotgun start 8 AM. Want to put together a foursome or sponsor a hole?
body:
Hi Merrill,

The Cary Rotary Charity Golf Outing is set for Saturday, July 19 at Foxford Hills Golf Club — 8:00 AM shotgun start, lunch and raffle to follow. All proceeds benefit the Cary-Grove food pantry.

Would you like to register a foursome ($600) or sponsor a hole ($250)? Several of the downtown business owners are already in. Hope you can join us!

Cary Rotary Club

subject: Chamber Summer Dinner & Awards — July 9
snippet: Join fellow members for the Chamber's Summer Dinner & Business Awards on Wednesday, July 9 at the Cary American Legion, 6:30 PM. Harbor Wellness is nominated for New Business of the Year!
body:
Dear Merrill,

The Cary-Grove Chamber of Commerce invites you to our Summer Dinner & Business Awards:

Wednesday, July 9, 2026
Cary American Legion Hall
6:30 PM reception · 7:00 PM dinner & awards

We're delighted to share that Harbor Wellness Dispensary has been nominated for New Business of the Year. We hope you'll be there to celebrate. Tickets are $45; reply to reserve your seat.

Warm regards,
Cary-Grove Chamber of Commerce

subject: Don't forget — Sofia's birthday dinner Sunday!
snippet: Reminder that Sofia's 16th birthday dinner is this Sunday at 5 at the house. Your sister is coming in from Madison. Please don't schedule anything over it this time :)
body:
Hi hon,

Just a reminder — Sofia's 16th birthday dinner is THIS Sunday, June 28 at 5:00 at the house. My sister is driving in from Madison and the Garcias are coming too.

Please keep the evening clear — no dispensary fires, no village calls if you can help it. She really wants you there for the cake.

Love,
Diane

subject: Industry mixer + policy update — July 15, Schaumburg
snippet: Network with fellow dispensary owners and hear the latest on banking and tax (280E) reform at our summer mixer, July 15 at the Schaumburg Convention Center, 5:30 PM.
body:
Hello Merrill,

The Cannabis Business Association of Illinois invites you to our Summer Industry Mixer:

Tuesday, July 15, 2026
Schaumburg Convention Center
5:30 PM networking · 6:30 PM policy briefing

We'll cover the latest on cannabis banking access, the federal 280E tax situation, and pending Illinois social-equity rules. A good chance to connect with other operators. Members free; reply to add your name to the list.

IL Cannabis Business Association

subject: Thank you — and a volunteer shift July 5?
snippet: Thank you for Harbor Wellness's donation drive! We're short volunteers for the Saturday July 5 morning distribution. Could you and a couple of staff join us 9–noon?
body:
Dear Merrill,

Thank you so much — the canned-goods drive Harbor Wellness ran brought in over 600 pounds of food for local families. It truly helps.

We're a little short-handed for our Saturday, July 5 morning distribution (9:00–12:00). If you and a couple of your team could lend a hand sorting and handing out groceries, we'd be grateful. No experience needed.

With appreciation,
Cary-Grove Food Pantry
